name: Tangy Seafood Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Medium-size fresh shrimp, cooked, peeled, and cut in half lengthwise
1 cup Sargento Fancy Supreme Shredded Mozzarella Cheese
1 small Vidalia or other sweet onion, thinly sliced
1 small Green pepper, cut into thin strips
1/2 cup Sargento Fancy Supreme Shredded Parmesan Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll pizza dough and press onto the bottom and up the sides of a 12-inch pizza pan. Prebake according to package directions; set aside.
2. Combine steak sauce and the next three ingredients; spread over pizza crust. Arrange shrimp over sauce; sprinkle with mozzarella cheese. Arrange onion and green pepper over mozzarella cheese. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
3. Bake at 450 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes, or until thoroughly heated.
4. Yield: one 12-inch pizza
